issues.description: DSL does not represent the card effect. Card text describes a static restriction ('cannot attack unless...'), not a triggered action. Current DSL models an unrelated OnPlay trigger with PowerBoost and PlaySelf, which contradicts the actual card mechanic.
Trigger type 'Trigger' is incorrect for a static restriction. Should use a restriction/prevention mechanic, not an OnPlay trigger.
Actions (PowerBoost, PlaySelf) do not match card text. Card requires a static check: cannot attack unless an opponent's Character has 12000+ base power.

suggestedDsl.effectText: This Character cannot attack unless there is a Character with 12000 base power or more.
